sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60684" key="kuli/keios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῠλῐ´κ-ειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n60684.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of a cup</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ζητήματα</foreign> discussions <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">over wine</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:108" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.108</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
